<!-- indicator: fig-disconnected-youth -->

```{python}
#| echo: false
#| warning: false
#| message: false
#| label: fig-disconnected-youth
#| fig-cap: 'Percentage of Disconnected Youth, 16–19 Years Old, 2014–2023'
#| fig-alt: 'Data visualization showing Percentage of Disconnected Youth, 16–19 Years Old, 2014–2023.'
from scripts.cha_registry_renderer import render_figure_object
render_figure_object(figure_id="fig-disconnected-youth", workbook_path=CHA_WORKBOOK_PATH).show()
```
